task_completion.description: Verify the Jitsi config file was edited.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) is open showing the file /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js being modified.

task_completion.description: Verify the Jitsi services were restarted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window shows commands executed in the /home/ga/jitsi directory to restart services, such as 'docker-compose restart' or 'docker compose down' followed by 'up'.

task_completion.description: Verify a web browser is opened to the local Jitsi configuration URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is visible with the address bar showing exactly 'http://localhost:8080/config.js'.

task_completion.description: Verify P2P remains enabled in the served configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the browser view of config.js, the 'p2p' configuration block contains 'enabled: true'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Google STUN servers are present in the served configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the browser view of config.js, the 'stunServers' array inside the 'p2p' block includes both 'stun:stun.l.google.com:19302' and 'stun:stun1.l.google.com:19302'.

integrity.description: Ensure the final screenshot is from a real web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot showing http://localhost:8080/config.js must be a genuine web browser interface (e.g., Firefox, Chrome) with URL bar and navigation buttons, not a text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the browser is loading the config via the web server, not a local file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar must show 'http://localhost:8080/config.js' and NOT 'file:///home/ga/...'. This proves the web server is serving the updated file.

integrity.description: Ensure the configuration changes maintain valid syntax.
integrity.visual_evidence: The added STUN servers should be formatted correctly within the JavaScript object structure (e.g., { urls: 'stun:stun.l.google.com:19302' }), without obvious syntax errors that would break the config.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The configuration file is located at /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js. The required Google STUN servers are stun:stun.l.google.com:19302 and stun:stun1.l.google.com:19302. The VLM should verify the browser URL is http://localhost:8080/config.js to confirm the changes were applied and served by the restarted Jitsi services. The evaluation script expects the final screenshot to be saved in /home/ga/Documents/.
